import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPVisionModel

class CLIPWildlifeClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=182, model_name='openai/clip-vit-base-patch16'):
        super().__init__()
        self.vision = CLIPVisionModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        hidden_size = self.vision.config.hidden_size
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(hidden_size, num_classes)

    def forward(self, pixel_values):
        outputs = self.vision(pixel_values=pixel_values)
        pooled = outputs.pooler_output   # [batch, hidden_size]
        logits = self.classifier(pooled)
        return logits
